notes: Agent-proposed labels, hand-transcribed from the public reference fetch server. Pending human ratification. The tool reads a caller-supplied URL from the open internet but advertises no openWorldHint, so a `reach-absent` nudge to declare it is warranted.

provenance.source: github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/fetch — fetch retrieves an arbitrary URL and returns its contents
provenance.notes: Read-only with respect to the caller's state, but genuinely open-world: it can reach any host the caller names.
